ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "inventory_uom" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the item */,
  "reorder_level" TEXT /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for reordering the item */,
  "cost_price" TEXT /* Cost price of the item */,
  "selling_price" TEXT /* Selling price of the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES item_suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_status" TEXT /* Status of the warehouse (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item in the inventory */,
  "on_hand" TEXT /* Current quantity of the item in the warehouse */,
  "on_order" TEXT /* Quantity of the item currently on order */,
  "allocated" TEXT /* Quantity of the item allocated to outstanding orders */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the inventory level */,
  "reorder_quantity" TEXT /* Quantity to reorder when the inventory falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (receipt, issue, transfer) */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the transaction occurred */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item involved in the transaction */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, clerk) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item involved in the change */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the change occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (receipt, issue, transfer) */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information used to make the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., inventory, transaction) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report if stored as a file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "category_status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_uoms" (
  "uom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "uom_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the location is */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the location */,
  "location_status" TEXT /* Status of the location (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_location" (
  "item_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item location */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the item at the location */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_location_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_location_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES warehouse_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reconciliation" (
  "reconciliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reconciliation record */,
  "reconciliation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reconciliation */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the reconciliation occurred */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item involved in the reconciliation */,
  "discrepancy" TEXT /* Discrepancy found during the reconciliation */,
  "reconciliation_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the reconciliation */,
  "reconciled_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the reconciliation */,
  "reconciled_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reconciliation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reconciliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reconciliation_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reconciliation_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reconciliation_reconciled_by FOREIGN KEY ("reconciled_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cycle_counts" (
  "cycle_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cycle count record */,
  "cycle_count_date" TEXT /* Date of the cycle count */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the cycle count occurred */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Reference to the item involved in the cycle count */,
  "counted_quantity" TEXT /* Quantity counted during the cycle count */,
  "counted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the cycle count */,
  "counted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cycle count was performed */,
  "count_note" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the cycle count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cycle_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycle_counts_counted_by FOREIGN KEY ("counted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycle_counts_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cycle_counts_item_code FOREIGN KEY ("item_code") REFERENCES items ("item_code")
)
